title: hieracium neosaliencianum subsp. pictosaliencanum
intro: Hieracium neosaliencianum subsp. pictosaliencanum, also known as Salsify Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve indigestion. The plant's roots, leaves, and flowers have been used in herbal preparations to treat various health issues, including inflammation and digestive problems. Preparations of Hieracium neosaliencianum subsp. pictosaliencanum can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal benefits.
